blended.narrative: Schweitzer is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,816 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 3.2" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 7" over the past week. Current depth: 60".
